non_500_rows.note: Not an Amadeus 500. Direct API and child MCP execution returned 200; parent travel render failed because the large child result was stored as a NoETL reference and was not hydrated into the parent.

1_characterise_failure_pattern.failure_pattern_summary: Flights, locations, and hotels consistently return Amadeus test API HTTP 500 / code 38189. Activities is a separate local result-carrier issue, not an upstream 500.

errors.title: Internal error
errors.detail: An internal error occurred, please contact your administrator

notes: Flight docs list the same minimum GET shape that also failed with 38189: originLocationCode, destinationLocationCode, departureDate, adults.
Airport and City Search requires subType and keyword as query parameters; NoETL sends both.
Hotel List by city requires cityCode; docs example cityCode=PAR failed with 38189.
Activities docs example returned 200, confirming credentials and test API are not globally down.

4_verdict_and_fix.re_smoke_result_change: No ops PR. Direct reproduction confirms Amadeus test API/service-side 38189 for flights, locations, and hotels. Activities follow-up is separate from the 500 verdict.

regressions_found.name: activities child result stored by reference
regressions_found.details: search_activities returns 200 and 1799 items, but parent travel renders failure because the large child result is a NoETL reference that the parent-side fetch path does not hydrate.

notes: No Amadeus credential values or full access token values were recorded. Temporary local secret files used for curl reproduction were removed.
deferred_followups: Production-Amadeus endpoint/credential switch round when production credentials are ready.
Activities result compaction or NoETL reference hydration so successful activities searches do not render as friendly failures.
Optional retry policy for Amadeus 38189 only if production evidence shows transient recovery.
